summary: Tested bug fixes from iteration_66: Session Journal integration in character sheet, Campaign sidebar Combat group navigation, Quick NPC Bar, and Party Inventory treasure generator. All 8 features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CharacterSheetFull.js correctly imports and renders SessionJournal component in the 'journal' tab (line 833-835)
SessionJournal.js auto-tagging works correctly - detected 'combat' and 'travel' tags from text containing battle/fight keywords
Tag filter chips work correctly - clicking a tag filters entries to only show those with that tag
CampaignDashboard.js group click handler (line 236) correctly navigates to first tab in group when active tab is outside the group
CombatConsolidatedTab.js renders with 'Combat Setup' and 'Encounter Gen' sub-tabs as expected
CombatCreatorTab.js Quick NPC Bar (line 513-557) displays when campaign has NPCs - shows 3 NPCs with HP/AC stats
PartyInventory.js treasure generator works: Generate Treasure button, CR tier selector, Roll button, and Add to Party Loot button all functional
PartyInventory.js Split Gold button visible and functional
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 features from iteration_66 bug fixes verified working: 1) Session Journal integrated in character sheet journal tab with auto-tagging and tag filtering, 2) Campaign sidebar Combat group click navigates to Combat tab, 3) CombatConsolidatedTab shows Combat Setup and Encounter Gen sub-tabs, 4) Quick NPC Bar visible in Combat Creator when campaign has NPCs, 5) Party Inventory treasure generator with Roll and Add to Party Loot buttons, 6) Split Gold button visible. Character sheet tabs are: combat, spells, inventory, journal, notes.

features_verified.session_journal_in_character_sheet: PASSED - Journal tab shows SessionJournal component with 'Session Journal' header and 'New Entry' button
features_verified.session_journal_auto_tagging: PASSED - Creating entry with combat keywords ('fought', 'battle', 'defeated') auto-detects 'combat' tag
features_verified.session_journal_tag_filter: PASSED - Clicking tag chip filters entries to show only those with that tag
features_verified.campaign_sidebar_combat_navigation: PASSED - Clicking COMBAT group header navigates to Combat tab (not stays on Setting)
features_verified.combat_consolidated_tab_subtabs: PASSED - CombatConsolidatedTab renders with 'Combat Setup' and 'Encounter Gen' sub-tabs
features_verified.quick_npc_bar: PASSED - Quick NPC Bar visible in Combat Creator showing 3 NPCs (Gareth Northwood, Yorick Underhill, Yorick Thornwood)
features_verified.party_inventory_treasure_generator: PASSED - Generate Treasure button, CR tier selector, Roll button, and Add to Party Loot button all functional
features_verified.party_inventory_split_gold: PASSED - Split Gold button visible in Party Treasury section

test_1_journal_tab.description: Journal tab exists in character sheet and renders SessionJournal component
test_1_journal_tab.evidence: Found tabs: combat, spells, inventory, journal, notes. Clicked journal tab and found 'Session Journal' header and 'New Entry' button

test_2_auto_tagging.description: Auto-tagging detects combat keywords and adds 'combat' tag
test_2_auto_tagging.evidence: Filled title 'Battle at the Bridge' and content with 'fought', 'battle', 'defeated' keywords. AUTO-DETECTED TAGS section appeared with 'combat' and 'travel' tags

test_3_tag_filtering.description: Clicking tag chip filters journal entries
test_3_tag_filtering.evidence: Clicked combat tag filter, found 2 entries with combat tag

test_4_combat_group_navigation.description: Clicking Combat group header navigates to Combat tab
test_4_combat_group_navigation.evidence: Started on Setting tab, clicked Combat group header, Combat tab became active

test_5_combat_subtabs.description: CombatConsolidatedTab shows Combat Setup and Encounter Gen sub-tabs

test_6_quick_npc_bar.description: Quick NPC Bar visible when campaign has NPCs
test_6_quick_npc_bar.evidence: Found data-testid='quick-npc-bar' showing 3 NPCs with HP:10 AC:10 stats

test_7_treasure_generator.description: Party Inventory treasure generator fully functional
test_7_treasure_generator.evidence: Found Split Gold button, Generate Treasure button, Roll button, and Add to Party Loot button. Generated 16 GP loot
